summary: W919 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W918's source-category triangulation fields as raw source-category propositions: Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) and IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA). It reconstructs the W918 source-field shape through sourcePretriangulatedOfRawFieldW919, sourceTriangulatedOfRawFieldW919, and triangleCompletionOfRawFieldW919, then projects back through W918 into the stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because all W919 route leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W919 exposes the source-category Pretriangulated and IsTriangulated propositions as raw fields, but these fields and the rest of the W919 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W919 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W919 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, raw relation-pullback and target-relation-lift condition propositions, raw target surjectivity and compactness propositions, raw selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 projection closed-map propositions, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W919 closed-map source-raw-fields explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from source-image normalization, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, branch selection, endpoint facts, localized-right-adjoint data, source-category triangulation evidence, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
remaining_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W919 exposes the source-category Pretriangulated and IsTriangulated propositions as raw fields, but these fields and the rest of the W919 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.
